title: Familien - SMP Pack
description: Official Mod Pack for the Familien - Community SMP/RP Server!
body:
This mod pack is created to preserve as much as possible of the original Minecraft gameplay while adding optimisations, quality of life improvements, and a touch of ✨Stream With Lien Magic✨

We've been testing around to make sure that every Familien player was able to enjoy the same experience while playing on the community servers and after a trial period they all where very excited. It's an improved, newer experience compared with the vanilla version, and you don't want to miss on it!

This mod pack, which we have curated, brings together the best gameplay experience for the Familien Community SMP/RP Server. If you're eager to dive in and start playing quickly, this mod pack will get you into the action in no time.


**Who can use this pack?**
-------------------------------------------------------------
- The Familien SMP/RP server is only for active Familien Community Members.
- The server uses whitelisting; granted access will be done via StreamWithLien only.
- Join the streams on Twitch to gather more information.
- The community excist with _**mainly DUTCH speaking**_ people!

**How to install?**
-------------------------------------------------------------
- We recommend the Modrinth Launcher. Easy to use for everybody!
- Sign in to the launcher with your Minecraft account
- Download the latest version of Familien - SMP Pack
- Delete old versions first, if necessary! 
- Install the SMP pack via the Modrinth Launcher

**Questions about this SMP Pack**
-------------------------------------------------------------
- In case of questions, please join the Discord of StreamWithLien
- Place your question in the Minecraft Section - General Chat
- Only questions from the Familien Community will be answered
